en: What if I told you one of the most iconic comedy-horror franchises is finally coming back?
Yes, after years of waiting, Scary Movie is officially returning with Scary Movie 6. The original films were famous for
hilariously parodying popular horror movies like Scream and The Ring.
Now fans are excited because the new movie is expected to parody modern horror hits like Get Out and M3gin.
The franchise has always been known for its crazy jokes, ridiculous scenes and unforgettable characters.
So the big question is, will Scary Movie 6 bring back the same wild comedy that made the originals so legendary?
Let me know in the comments and subscribe for more Hollywood movie updates.
